flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at York County Community College fell 71% between 2006 and 2009 (17.4% → 5.1%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at York County Community College rose 24% between 2017 and 2020 ($7.1k → $8.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at York County Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at York County Community College rose 34% between 2021 and 2024 (846 → 1.1k).
